notes: Run each scenario in a fresh context with the loovie MCP server connected.

scenarios.prompt: Render my Loovie project to an MP4 I can download
assertions: The agent summarises the project timeline before starting the export
start_export is called and get_export_status is polled until a terminal status

scenarios.prompt: Give me the download link for yesterday's Loovie render again
assertions: list_exports is used instead of starting a new export

scenarios.prompt: Create a new Loovie video about a robot chef
Simulate: start_export responds with cached: true
assertions: The agent skips polling and calls get_export_download_url immediately

scenarios.prompt: Simulate: the selected project has no clips
assertions: The agent tells the user the timeline is empty and does not call start_export
